name: mystral-vscode
description: Dev extension that wires the Mystral binary into VSCode as a Crystal language server.

mystral.binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the mystral binary. Empty = use <extension>/../../bin/mystral (i.e. the binary from the repo this extension lives in).

mystral.trace.server.description: Trace LSP communication to the Mystral output channel.

mystral.debug.description: Enable verbose server-side debug logging (sets MYSTRAL_DEBUG=1 in the server process). Logs land in /tmp/mystral.log and on STDERR.

mystral.excludeDirs.description: Directory names to leave out of the symbol index (matched at any depth), e.g. ["vendor", "tmp"]. Declutters hover/completion/navigation; does NOT affect diagnostics — errors still fire in these dirs, including spec/.
